description: conformance fixture: ResolvedPublicKeys + KeyRotationState v0.3.0 schema validation (including the previousValidBefore cutoff safety invariant)

valid.description: STABLE - single key, no rotation in progress
ROTATING - verify with current key (outbound window phase, new envelopes signed with current) + cutoff
ROTATING - verify with previous key fallback (inbound window phase, in-flight artifacts signed with previous) + cutoff
FROZEN - key frozen (compromise / administrator lockout), only current is valid

invalid.expectedError: rotationState must be equal to one of the allowed values

invalid.description: STABLE but the previous field is present (semantic contradiction: STABLE implies no previous key; the schema should reject)
invalid.expectedError: STABLE state must not have previous key
